evaluators.name: Corporate Lunch Buffet Configuration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added a customizable corporate lunch buffet for 25 guests with <=$25 per-person price and at least 3 vegetarian dishes, and only one such lunch package is in the cart.

evaluators.name: Wedding Mid-Priced 3-Course Dinner Quote Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user submitted a quote for 120 guests using a mid-priced 3-course plated wedding dinner with a per-person bar service add-on and a future event date.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Birthday Package Comparison Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user compared at least two dessert-including birthday packages that can serve 40 guests and added only the cheaper one for 40 guests to the cart.

evaluators.name: Custom Dinner Menu Builder Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a dinner custom menu with at least 2 appetizers, 2 mains, 1 dessert, <=$55 per person for 20–30 guests, and added it to the cart/summary.

evaluators.name: Earliest Saturday Evening Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked the earliest available Saturday evening slot in July 2025 for at least 80 guests and submitted booking details to reach a summary-ready state.

evaluators.name: 60-Guest Package with Promo Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user chose a package for 60 guests with base price <=$50, added exactly two paid add-ons, applied a 15% promo code, and achieved a discounted total under $2,600.

evaluators.name: Gluten-Free Tasting List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that a tasting or favorites list contains at least two unique savory gluten-free dishes and one unique gluten-free dessert, all rated 4+ stars.

evaluators.name: Three-Day Coffee Break Scheduling Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user scheduled a coffee-break package for 50 guests on three consecutive available May 2025 mornings as separate cart items.
